title: KandyToys Electric Water Gun Rechargeable High Capacity & Long Range Water Pistol
features: SPECTACULAR, UPGRADED PERFORMANCE: The KandyToys Electric Water Pistol will have you prepared for any water gun battle this summer. It delivers impressive range, speed and power, all automatically at a pull of the trigger! The upgraded motor and battery offers rapid fire and fast shooting, plus an exceptional 25ft range!

EXCEPTIONAL FEATURES: The water gun grip has a non-slip design that makes it easy to handle and is designed to be rugged and robust, perfect for family water fights! The grip has a non-slip design and rounded edges to avoid damage, making it ideal for children and adults alike.

LONG LASTING BATTERY: Don't let running out of power ruin the fun! The upgraded battery that the water pistol features offers a massive 50 minutes of use and the standard USB charger means you can spend less time hunting for cables and more time cooling off in the heat of battle!

VERSATILE PLAY: By fitting the powerful water spray system into a compact water pistol, you can take your water gun anywhere this summer - perfect for use as a garden toy, beach toys, family entertainment or anywhere that battle might break out!

BATTERY INCLUDED: Includes one high-capacity 3.7V battery (single battery lasts 50 minutes) and a USB charger. Single battery charging time is 110 minutes. Age Recommendation: Not suitable for under 3 year olds
description: Product Description Rechargeable The 3.7V Li-ion battery is rechargeable via the USB cable provided; a full charge will take approximately 110 minutes. Constant Pressure The electric pump makes continuous firing easy with consistent pressure - no need for pump action! Easy to fill Press the magazine release button and the magazine slides out; simply fill up to 90 ml capacity and slide back in! Long range Work on that aim and zone in on targets from a distance. The pistol has a firing range of up to 25 feet!
